creator: koden@bsdmail.com
text:
We From Indonesia, we have Freebsd Indonesia User Group ( FIUG ), and we need ( in Indonesia ) Mirror FreeBSD & how to offer the services.
We was read and understand doc articels doc/en/articles/hubs/mirror-howto and we have prepared all of its corresponding. We're ready to open new mirror in Indonesia. We are all that are here expect the developer to help and agreed.
 
Best Regards

FreeBSD Indonesia User Group
